# Empirical Evaluation Results

*Auto-generated by `eval_metrics.py` — 156 test cases evaluated.*


## Table 1: Restoration Quality (PSNR/SSIM) by Degradation Type

| Degradation Type | N | PSNR (Degraded) | PSNR (Restored) | Δ PSNR | SSIM (Degraded) | SSIM (Restored) | Δ SSIM |
|-----------------|---|-----------------|-----------------|--------|-----------------|-----------------|--------|
| combined | 26 | 3.68 | 7.06 | +3.38 | 0.3232 | 0.5769 | +0.2537 |
| dark | 52 | 4.06 | 7.44 | +3.38 | 0.3766 | 0.6523 | +0.2757 |
| gaussian_blur | 26 | 25.12 | 19.53 | -5.59 | 0.8597 | 0.8096 | -0.0502 |
| motion_blur | 52 | 24.37 | 23.86 | -0.51 | 0.8575 | 0.8535 | -0.0040 |
| **Overall** | **156** | **14.28** | **14.87** | **+0.59** | **0.6085** | **0.7330** | **+0.1245** |

## Table 2: Edge Recovery Rate — Baseline Comparison

| Method | Overall Recovery | Dark Images | Blur Images | Combined |
|--------|-----------------|-------------|-------------|----------|
| Canny Only | 26.53% | 41.25% | 24.70% | 2.59% |
| CLAHE + Canny | 31.93% | 51.77% | 26.24% | 9.30% |
| HistEq + Canny | 36.13% | 89.73% | 8.56% | 11.64% |
| Adaptive Thresh | 55.36% | 58.91% | 47.18% | 72.79% |
| **Ours (ADRR + Canny)** | **32.30%** | **63.30%** | **19.83%** | **7.68%** |

## Table 3: ADRR Degradation Detection Accuracy

| Detection Task | Accuracy | Correct / Total |
|---------------|----------|-----------------|
| Low-light detection | 81.4% | 127/156 |
| Motion blur detection | 58.3% | 91/156 |
| **Combined** | **69.9%** | **218/312** |

## Table 4: Content Classification Gate Accuracy

| Content Type | Accuracy | N |
|-------------|----------|---|
| Text | 100.0% | 60 |
| Scene | 3.3% | 60 |
| Mixed | 5.6% | 36 |
| **Overall** | **41.0%** | **156** |

## Table 6: Ablation Study — Contribution of Each Pipeline Stage

*Measured by average SSIM improvement over degraded input across all test cases.*

| Configuration | Avg SSIM | Δ vs Degraded |
|--------------|----------|---------------|
| Degraded input (no restoration) | 0.6085 | — |
| **Full pipeline (ADRR + Classification)** | **0.7330** | **+0.1245** |
